conventions.azimuth: Degrees clockwise from true north; reference emulator evaluates offsets 0, 1/12, and 1/6 degree and retains the ray with the maximum slope.
conventions.pixel_coordinates: Floating-point pixel centers with X=column and Y=row.

cases.description: Flat spherical terrain sampled toward true east.
A 150 m obstacle toward true north.
A 150 m obstacle toward true southeast.
A 150 m obstacle toward true south.
A 150 m obstacle toward true southwest.
A 150 m obstacle toward true west.
A 150 m obstacle toward true northwest.
Flat spherical terrain at 10 m/pixel toward true east.
A lower near peak and a horizon-setting higher far peak on one east ray.
A north-south ridge crossing three adjacent quarter-degree azimuth bins.
A north-south ridge crossing three adjacent quarter-degree azimuth bins.
A north-south ridge crossing three adjacent quarter-degree azimuth bins.
Negative terrain elevations with an observer elevated 20 m above the center.
A nodata hole intersecting an otherwise valid east ray.
A valid center surrounded by a nodata DEM border.
Every terrain cell east of the observer is nodata.
Observer four pixels from the west boundary with an east obstacle.
A 63 by 47 partial DEM with a horizon-setting east obstacle.
Obstacle immediately beside the 500 m near/far calculation threshold.
Obstacle immediately beside the 500 m near/far calculation threshold.
A 150 m obstacle 20 pixels east of the observer, sampled toward true east.
The same east-side obstacle, sampled in the opposite direction.
A 150 m obstacle northeast of the observer, sampled at 45 degrees true azimuth.
The same northeast obstacle, sampled in the opposite diagonal direction.
The inner flat DEM alone, used as the nested-coverage comparison.
Nested flat DEMs with a 250 m obstacle in the outer DEM toward true east.
A 30 m inner DEM and 60 m outer DEM with the horizon-setting feature in the outer DEM.

pyramid_fixtures.description: A 7x5 DEM containing NaN, infinities, the -20000 m cutoff, a value immediately above the cutoff, and all-invalid factor-four blocks.

subpatch_fixtures.description: A complete 4x4 halo-inclusive subpatch-center grid at the primary DEM corner, with 16 azimuth bins and two DEM passes.
A compact subpatch grid centered 500 km from both stereographic axes, where grid convergence is materially nonzero.

horizon_buffer_fixtures.description: Production hierarchy-enabled subpatch traversal for one primary-center pixel, all 1,440 azimuths, and separate inner/outer DEM passes. The outer DEM extends far enough east to force hierarchy descent toward a 5,000 m synthetic obstacle.
